subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! In this station there hath appeared in its glory that which was promised in the Divine Books, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود ظاهر شد در اینمقام محمود آنچه در کتب الهی موعود بود ولکن خلق
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prophecy and fulfillment, @justice and wrath of God
